calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas for Diane Churchill (Petitioner). Kalliope Bellesis (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona. Mykol Hamilton appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Mr. Jonas stated that he had a chance to review what was filed by Ms. Hamilton and that is has nothing to do with the relief that is being requested. Ms. Hamilton expressed concern about events that occurred prior to Ms. Mitchell's death, changes that were made to the Trust document 3-days before her death, Ms. Mitchell's state of mind, etc. Ms. Bellesis stated that she was here because there has been no communication from Ms. Churchill and to find out what's going on. Mr. Jonas stated that a notice issue was not raised by the Probate Examiner and that he will resolve the communication issue. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Continued To Jun-04-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas for Diane Churchill (Petitioner). Lynne Barry appeared by telephone in Propria Persona. Dr. Michael Hamilton appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Ms. Barry requested a continuance stating that she is in the process of retaining an Attorney, that the 2000 Trust was tampered with, that her name was crossed out and that there are numerous missing amendments. Ms. Barry also stated that the amendments are all key documents, that she intends to do a search and that she needs two or three weeks. Mr. Jonas stated that the 2000 Trust was amended and fully re-stated in 2013, that Ms. Barry is named as Successor Trustee, that Ms. Barry is not an interested Beneficiary and that she has no standing. Mr. Jonas also stated that the Trust needs to be funded, that there are expenses and that the only asset is Ms. Mitchell's house. Ms. Hamilton stated that she is a beneficiary of the 2010 Trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was continued to June 4, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Opposition if any are due by May 21, 2014.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Continued To Apr-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
